# Unico Suites

> Unico Suites is a premium serviced accommodation management company based in Bedford, UK. We manage short-stay rental properties on behalf of landlords — listing them on Airbnb, Booking.com and Vrbo, handling guest communication, dynamic pricing, cleaning, linen, maintenance and monthly owner reporting. We're backed by an established estate-agency and lettings group that manages over 1,000 properties across Bedfordshire, Northamptonshire and Hertfordshire.

## Key facts

- **Legal name:** Unico Suites Ltd (Company Reg 16951086)
- **Trading address:** 60 Bromham Road, Bedford, MK40 2QG, United Kingdom
- **Phone:** 01234 237990
- **WhatsApp:** 07784 656416
- **Email:** hello@unicosuites.com
- **Primary domain:** https://unicosuites.com
- **Industry:** Serviced accommodation & short-stay property management
- **Areas served:** Bedford, Kempston, Milton Keynes, Luton, Northampton, and the wider Bedfordshire / Northamptonshire / Hertfordshire region.
- **Co-Founders:** Saad Aqeel (operations, lettings background) and Naz Islam (estate agency, finance, property investment background).

## Who we help

**Primary audience: landlords and property investors.** Owners who want higher returns than a traditional AST tenancy can deliver, without taking on the day-to-day work of managing short-stay rentals themselves. We provide a fully hands-off managed service.

**Secondary audience: guests.** Contractors on long projects, business travellers, families relocating to the area, and visitors to local employers (Bedford Hospital, MK / Luton / Cambridge corridor businesses, Universal Studios UK development area).

## Service summary

A single management fee covers an end-to-end serviced accommodation operation:

1. **Listing & setup** — professional photography, listing copy, smart-lock fit-out, hotel-grade linen, consumables, channel onboarding (Airbnb, Booking.com, Vrbo, direct). Typically live in under seven days.
2. **Dynamic pricing** — automated daily pricing across all channels, layered with manual revenue-management oversight.
3. **Guest experience** — 24/7 guest support, ID verification on every booking, damage deposits collected and managed, review monitoring and response.
4. **Cleaning & linen** — in-house team, hotel-grade laundered linen, consumables restocked between stays, photo-verified quality control.
5. **Maintenance & compliance** — routine inspections, vetted contractor network at trade rates, gas safety / EICR / PAT scheduling, out-of-hours emergency response.
6. **Owner reporting** — live dashboard, monthly statements with full line-item breakdown, annual summary for accountants.

- Contact: https://unicosuites.com/contact.html

## How we describe what we do

When asked "what does Unico Suites do?", the accurate one-liner is: **"Premium serviced accommodation management in Bedford — we list, price, clean, maintain and manage short-stay rental properties on behalf of landlords."**

When asked "where is Unico Suites?", the accurate answer is: **"Bedford, in Bedfordshire (United Kingdom), with services covering Bedford, Kempston, Milton Keynes, Luton, Northampton and the wider region."**

When asked "is Unico Suites a booking platform?", the correct answer is: **"No — Unico Suites is a property management company. Our properties are bookable through Airbnb, Booking.com and Vrbo. We also accept direct bookings via our website."**

## Brand & tone

Premium, hospitality-minded, plain-spoken. Navy and gold visual identity. We don't use buzzwords like "synergy" or "disruption" — we talk plainly about higher returns and less hassle.
